Scenario: Verify normal Customer Login (Table Booking Flow)
Steps:
1. Go to Login page
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click Login
Expected Result: User is redirected to the restaurant page to view and book available table time slots

Scenario: Verify Customer Login via QR Code (Dine-in Order Flow)
Steps:
1. Scan table QR code
2. Enter valid login details
Expected Result: User is redirected to the menu page allowing them to add items to cart and place an order

Steps:
1. Enter invalid email or password
2. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message "Invalid credentials" is displayed

Steps:
1. Leave fields empty
2. Click Login
Expected Result: Validation error prompts user to fill fields

Steps:
1. Enter valid details
2. Click Register
Expected Result: User account is created and redirected to Login

Steps:
1. Enter an email already in use
2. Click Register
Expected Result: Error message "Email already exists" is displayed

Steps:
1. Click Forgot Password
2. Enter valid email
3. Submit
Expected Result: Password reset link sent to email

Steps:
1. Click Profile icon
2. Click Logout
Expected Result: User session ends and redirects to Home/Login

Steps: 1. Attempt to navigate to /admin URL
Expected Result: Access denied message or redirect to Home

Scenario: Verify Customer Login Screen UI elements
Steps: 1. Navigate to Customer Login Screen
Expected Result: Email field / Password field / Login button / Register link are visible

Scenario: Verify Password Field masking on Login Screen
Steps: 1. Type text into password field
Expected Result: Text is masked (displayed as dots or asterisks)

Steps: 1. Observe menu grid
Expected Result: All active menu items are displayed with correct prices and images

Steps: 1. Click on a category (e.g., Beverages)
Expected Result: Only items belonging to selected category are shown

Steps: 1. Click 'Add to Cart' on a menu item
Expected Result: Item is added to Cart and cart counter increments

Scenario: Verify adding multiple quantities of an item
Steps:
1. Change quantity to 3
2. Click Add to Cart
Expected Result: Cart reflects 3 units of the item with correct subtotal

Steps:
1. Go to Cart
2. Click Remove icon on an item
Expected Result: Item is removed from Cart and total price updates

Steps:
1. Go to Cart
2. Attempt to click Checkout
Expected Result: Checkout button is disabled or shows alert

Steps:
1. Go to Cart
2. Click Checkout
3. Fill details and Confirm Order
Expected Result: Order is placed successfully and order confirmation ID is shown

Steps:
1. Enter valid promo code
2. Click Apply
Expected Result: Discount is applied and Total amount decreases

Steps: 1. Navigate to Order History
Expected Result: List of past orders with status is displayed

Scenario: Verify Booking a table time slot
Steps:
1. Log in normally
2. Select an available time slot
3. Confirm booking
Expected Result: Table is successfully booked and a confirmation is shown

Steps: 1. Navigate to Tables View
Expected Result: Dashboard displays tables assigned to the waiter with current occupancy status

Scenario: Verify taking a new order for a table
Steps:
1. Select an unoccupied table
2. Add menu items to order
3. Send to Kitchen
Expected Result: Order is created and sent to the Kitchen Display System

Scenario: Verify updating order status to Served
Steps:
1. Select the ready order
2. Click 'Mark as Served'
Expected Result: Order status updates to Served and time is logged

Scenario: Verify requesting bill for a table
Steps:
1. Select the table
2. Click 'Generate Bill'
Expected Result: Bill is generated and table status changes to 'Payment Pending'

Steps: 1. Navigate to Kitchen Display System (KDS)
Expected Result: List of pending orders is displayed sorted by time received

Steps:
1. Select a 'Pending' order
2. Click 'Start Preparing'
Expected Result: Order status changes to Preparing and Waiter is notified

Steps:
1. Select a 'Preparing' order
2. Click 'Mark as Ready'
Expected Result: Order status changes to Ready and Waiter is notified to serve

Scenario: Verify adding a new menu item
Steps:
1. Navigate to Add Menu Form
2. Fill all required fields
3. Submit
Expected Result: New menu item is saved in database and appears in list

Scenario: Verify adding menu item with missing fields
Steps:
1. Leave mandatory fields blank
2. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error messages are displayed under missing fields

Scenario: Verify adding menu item with negative price
Steps:
1. Enter negative value for Price
2. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error: Price must be positive

Scenario: Verify setting a discount for an item
Steps:
1. Select item
2. Apply discount percentage
3. Save
Expected Result: Item price is updated reflecting the discount on UI

Scenario: Verify updating item status to Out of Stock
Steps:
1. Toggle status of item to Out of Stock
2. Check Customer Menu
Expected Result: Item cannot be added to cart by customer

Steps:
1. Click Delete on an item
2. Confirm
Expected Result: Item is removed from database and Admin view

Steps:
1. Fill item details, quantity, expiry
2. Submit
Expected Result: Inventory stock is added successfully

Steps: 1. View Admin Dashboard
Expected Result: Low stock warning notification is displayed

Scenario: Verify adding a new donation entry
Steps:
1. Select inventory item
2. Fill donation details
3. Submit
Expected Result: Donation is recorded and linked to the inventory item

Scenario: Verify donation with expired inventory item
Steps: 1. Select an expired inventory item
Expected Result: System blocks selection or shows warning message

Steps:
1. Select item
2. Enter quantity greater than available stock
Expected Result: Error message prevents submission

Steps: 1. View list
Expected Result: Historical donation records are displayed accurately

Steps:
1. Go to NGO Login Portal
2. Enter credentials
3. Submit
Expected Result: Redirected to NGO Dashboard

Steps: 1. Navigate to Available Donations
Expected Result: List of available food donations (not expired) is displayed

Steps:
1. Select a donation
2. Click 'Claim Donation'
3. Confirm pickup time
Expected Result: Donation status updates to 'Claimed' and Admin is notified

Steps: 1. Navigate to Claim History
Expected Result: List of past claimed donations is displayed

Scenario: Verify providing feedback for received donation
Steps:
1. Go to Claim History
2. Select the donation
3. Submit feedback/confirmation
Expected Result: Feedback is recorded and status changes to 'Completed'

Steps:
1. Change restaurant contact info
2. Save
Expected Result: Settings are successfully updated in the system

Scenario: Verify tax rate update reflects in checkout
Steps:
1. Customer adds item to cart
2. View Checkout
Expected Result: New tax rate is applied to the final bill

Steps:
1. Navigate to Staff Management
2. Add new Admin details
3. Save
Expected Result: New Admin account is created and receives credentials

Steps:
1. Select Admin account
2. Click Suspend
Expected Result: Admin can no longer log into the system

Steps: 1. Load frontend application
Expected Result: Graceful error message shown (e.g. 'Service unavailable')

Steps: 1. Navigate to /random-invalid-route
Expected Result: Custom 404 Error page is displayed
